blocks.text: Its pretty simple. An at-home mail in test to test and see if you are a robot. Simply spit in the tube, and mail the samples into our centralized testing service.

Bonus points if you can find some DNA from the John Turing family line, and see if you are a Turing at the same time. Alternatively add a false claim of testing for this with 99.9999999% worldwide accuracy (will be wrong for their family only)
Bonus points if you get shut down by the FDA
